name: SUNRISE REAL ESTATE GROUP INC
summary: Sunrise Real Estate Group, Inc. (SRRE) is a Texas holding company conducting business through subsidiaries in China. Principal activities include real estate development, property leasing services, and property management services in the PRC. Operating subsidiaries SHXJY and SHSY are property agency businesses earning commission revenue from marketing and sales services to developers. The company also has interests in residential land development projects through LYSY.

products.name: Property Agency Services
products.description: Commission-based marketing and sales services to real estate developers through SHXJY and SHSY.

products.name: Real Estate Development
products.description: Development of residential properties including villa-style housing, operated through subsidiaries in PRC.

products.name: Property Management Services
products.description: Property management services provided through subsidiaries based in mainland China.

products.name: Property Leasing Services
products.description: Leasing of properties as part of the company's real estate operations in China.
